column1: # Prompt-size cold-vs-warm TTFT sweep — hybrid checkpoint KV cache
# cold = full prefill of a distinct prompt; warm = 2nd-use checkpoint restore + short suffix.
# Size-aware sample counts (n=8 at 256 ... n=1 at 100k). TTFT in milliseconds.
# Cold rises super-linearly (O(n^2) attention); warm stays ~flat (restore + suffix only).
